item.name: Logistics Node Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of some unknown material. Placing it near your reprogrammed logistics node will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Logistics Node
mount.action: Call into battle your Allagan logistics node. For your safety and the safety of those around you, all weaponry has been disabled.
mount.description: One of the automated system drones deployed by the Allagans to oversee logistics in their strongholds. After being unearthed by the Sons of Saint Coinach, the mechanical sphere was off-loaded to the Eorzean Alliance and modified into a personal transportation device.
